title: Styled Sticks
description: Have you ever wished that sticks came in all of the wood variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!
body:
# Styled Sticks
Have you ever wished that sticks came in all of the wood variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!

### What this datapack adds
- Oak Stick (Item)
- Spruce Stick (Item)
- Birch Stick (Item)
- Jungle Stick (Item)
- Acacia Stick (Item)
- Dark Oak Stick (Item)
- Mangrove Stick (Item)
- Crimson Stick (Item)
- Warped Stick (Item)
